NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER/NOTICE OF RULING FILED (RE PACIFIC GAS AND ELECTRIC COMPANY'S MOTION TO COMPEL DISCOVERY RESPONSES, ESTABLISH ADMISSIONS, AND OBTAIN SANCTIONS) FILED BY DEFENDANT PACIFIC GAS & ELECTRIC COMPANY

DISCOVERY 612, PRESENT: MATTHEW LOVELL, ESQ. FOR DEFENDANT/MOVING PARTY, PACIFIC GAS AND ELECTRIC COMPANY. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO COMPEL DISCOVERY RESPONSES AND TO ESTABLISH ADMISSIONS IS GRANTED AS IT SEEKS AN ORDER COMPELLING FURTHER RESPONSES. THE MOTION IS DENIED AS IT SEEKS TO HAVE THE REQUESTS FOR ADMISSIONS DEEMED ADMITTED. NO OPPOSITION HAS BEEN FILED. PLAINTIFFS' FAILURE TO RESPOND WAS A MISUSE OF THE DISCOVERY PROCESS. PLAINTIFFS ARE ORDERED TO RESPOND WITHIN 15 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED AGAINST PLAINTIFFS, JOINTLY AND SEVERALLY, IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,261.30, TO BE PAID WITHIN 30 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
